title: See Group ID when developer mode is turned on
excerpt: Please add the group ID to the group menu when developer mode is turned on. The column ID, and especially how it copies to clipboard when you click on it, is super useful. I’d love to be able to get the group ID just as …

posts.author: TPCouriers (Carla)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add the group ID to the group menu when developer mode is turned on. The column ID, and especially how it copies to clipboard when you click on it, is super useful. I’d love to be able to get the group ID just as easily!
